columns.name: trekkType
columns.description: Unique type identifier for the trekk

columns.name: trekkTypeTekst
columns.description: Description text for the trekk type

columns.name: prioGruppe
columns.description: Group identifier based on priority level

columns.name: trekkESDriftskr
columns.description: Indicates if the trekk is for operational purposes (Yes/No)

columns.name: brukerId
columns.description: Unique identifier of the user associated with the record

columns.name: tidspunkt
columns.description: The timestamp when the trekk entry was created or last modified

columns.name: forEtterMva
columns.description: Indicates whether VAT is calculated before (F) or after (E) the transaction

columns.name: rapporteres
columns.description: Indicates if the trekk is reported (Yes/No)

columns.name: generert
columns.description: Indicates if the data was generated automatically (Yes/No)

columns.name: reskKode
columns.description: Code indicating where the trekk should be recorded; L=Supplier control, K=Customer control

columns.name: plussMinus
columns.description: Indicates if the value is added (Plus) or subtracted (Minus)

columns.name: dfTillTrekk
columns.description: Amount related to a specific trekk type

columns.name: dfVatCat
columns.description: Category of VAT applicable for the trekk type

columns.name: dfVatType
columns.description: Type of VAT associated with the trekk

columns.name: dfVatPercent
columns.description: Percentage of VAT applicable for the trekk type

columns.name: dfVarekode
columns.description: Code identifying the product related to the trekk

columns.name: dfVare
columns.description: Name of the product associated with the trekk type

columns.name: dfProdukt
columns.description: Amount or quantity of the product related to the trekk

columns.name: dfOrgnrFakturaTrekk
columns.description: Organization number for the trekk related to a factura

columns.name: dfOrgnrAvrUtbetTrekk
columns.description: Organization number for the trekk related to recovery or payment
